Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
title: The anomalous inelastic scattering of alpha particles

x4freetext: The anomalous inelastic scattering of alpha particles

x4codes.hlp: Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Cambridge, MA, United States of America
Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Cambridge, MA, United States of America

x4freetext: The basic detector was CsI(Tl)
scintillation spectrometer preceded by a thin gas
counter. This counter assembly was mounted external
to a 10.2 cm diameter scattering chamber. The gas
counter was about 1 cm in front of the scintillation
crystal. The total thickness of this proportional
counter including gas and windows was equivalent to
approximately 5 cm of air.
Relative error
The background subtraction should not
introduce an error of greater than + - 15%
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
DATA-ERR -> ERR-1.

x4freetext: No explanation of relative units is given.
7.6*7.6 cm NaI scintillation spectrometer mounted on
a Dumont 6363 photomultiplier.

x4code.headerHelp: Error in value of quantity, defined under ERR-ANALYS

x4freetext: Uncertainty includes statistical errors,
errors which arise in the estimate of the energy
dependence of the NaI spectrometer and errors in the
estimate of the background beneath the anomalous peak
in the particle detector.
Fig.19
SD: BIB updated. The accuracy of data
presentation was revised. DATA-ERR1 -> DATA-ERR.
